arts.ttl: Al-Hilal 25-26 Home, Away & Third Kit Predictions - First of Post Neymar Era
arts.sum: Over the past few days, information about the Al-Hilal 2025-2026 kits was shared by Öpaleak.

arts.ttl: Al Hilal target second Real Madrid star before record Vinicius Junior bid
arts.sum: Al Hilal are interested in signing Real Madrid forward Rodrygo, who joins Vinicius Junior on the PIF's shortlist.

arts.ttl: What does Neymar’s departure mean for the Saudi league?
arts.sum: Neymar’s move from Al-Hilal to Brazilian club Santos means the Saudi Pro League has lost one of its most high-profile players. “He didn’t make a big impression but could never show his real quality because of the injuries,” said Roel Coumans, a former assistant coach with Saudi Arabia and head coach of three clubs in the country.

arts.ttl: Real's Rodrygo hails 'idol' Neymar's Santos return
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Rodrygo has said he cannot believe that his "idol" Neymar is returning to Santos and wishes to attend the former Barcelona star's unveiling.
